texto: Our conduct has a direct influence on how people think about the gospel. The world doesn't judge us by our theology
autor: the world judges us by our behavior. People don't necessarily want to know what we believe about the Bible. They want to see if what we believe makes a difference in our lives. Our actions either bring glory to God or misrepresent His truth.

Our actions either bring glory to God or misrepresent His truth. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Our conduct has a direct influence on how people think about the gospel.
